message:
fix(snapshots): accept corrected snapshots with stripped markup

The old snapshots incorrectly showed literal markup tags like
[bold]Pipeline[/] in panel titles. The new behavior correctly
strips the markup and shows plain text titles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
